messages.author: CyberDreamer
messages.text: Is anybody working on implementing deepsleep firmware code for the heltec v4 so that it doesn't get stuck in a booting loop when voltage go under around 3.3v. Looked at the firmware code and it did seem top be part of other ESP32 boards, but while the heltec v4 has solar and battery management, no safety at all were implemented to prevent the board to drain the battery beyond 3.3v. Protected battery voltage cut off only kicking in under 2.9v for most of them.
messages.content_html: Is anybody working on implementing deepsleep firmware code for the heltec v4 so that it doesn't get stuck in a booting loop when voltage go under around 3.3v. Looked at the firmware code and it did seem top be part of other ESP32 boards, but while the heltec v4 has solar and battery management, no safety at all were implemented to prevent the board to drain the battery beyond 3.3v. Protected battery voltage cut off only kicking in under 2.9v for most of them.
